h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.recoheredEarlier: the archive is less a trophy case and more a very biased lost-and-found
scored.statedInsightEvidence: Oh, I get it now, or I think I do: the letter is not a secret tunnel under Rome, it is just another witness with mud on its shoes and a file history.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner was moving toward expanding the 'biased lost-and-found' metaphor into a grand counter-narrative where the letter blows a hole in the winner's story.
